response.overview: Azuma Hisato is married to Norihito, whom she is completely in love with. Now 29 years old, she wants to have a child and they agree to start trying in three months. At the same time, Norihito makes a big mistake at work, and the company president, Mr. Goujo, sees the perfect opportunity to blackmail him and make Norihito's wife his personal secretary, submissive to all his orders.
response.title: Himawari wa Yoru ni Saku
